items.a: Anyone above 14 years of age can register, individually or as part of a team of up to 4 players.
A valid ID, your registration confirmation, and your competitive spirit. All games and equipment are provided.

items.q: How is the league stage scored?
items.a: Each match win awards 3 points, a draw 1 point, and a loss 0 points. Standings are ranked by total points, then head-to-head record.
The top 8 players from the league stage advance to single-elimination knockouts, followed by semi finals and the grand final.
The latest official publisher rulebook for each game is used, with league-specific time limits posted at each table.
No house rules are permitted during competitive rounds. Casual play areas are free-form.
Respectful conduct, honest play, and timely arrival at your assigned table are expected of every participant.
No. Any form of harassment, cheating, or disruptive behaviour results in immediate review by the organising committee.
Repeated rule violations, unsporting conduct, or failure to appear at two scheduled matches without notice.

items.q: Can I switch games after registering?
items.a: Yes, up until the registration deadline. Contact the help desk or email us to make changes.
Yes, spectator passes are available at the venue and cover all three days.
